validation_queries.description: All recursive frames were recorded (RECURSION_DEPTH=100 -> 101 frames)
validation_queries.error_message: Expected 101 'recurse' rows: the initial recurse(100) call plus 100 recursive descents. Fewer rows indicate the per-thread region cache is collapsing same-name nested calls.
validation_queries.query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM regions WHERE name = 'recurse'
